# Bram Wikkerink — Actor & Fractional CFO

> Bram Wikkerink is a professional actor, singer, and maker based in Amsterdam, and a fractional CFO and deal advisor for growing Dutch companies. He works at the intersection of storytelling and finance — with a background at PwC Deals and venture capital.

## Actor & Maker

Bram Wikkerink is a physical, energetic actor with a strong stage presence and a natural sense of comic timing. He works across a wide range of styles — from sharp comedy to raw emotion — with precision and genuine joy. Musicality runs through everything he makes. He sings (baritone), plays piano and guitar, and composes his own music.

### Casting specs
- Height: 185 cm
- Voice: Baritone
- Hair: Dark blonde
- Eyes: Blue
- Languages: Dutch (native), English (fluent), German (proficient)
- Instruments: Piano, guitar

### Recent productions
- Achter Vergeten Deuren (2025) — Delft Fringe Festival, dir. Anouscha Fajdiga
- Vrije Uitloop (2025) — graduation production, dir. Remco Melles
- Barkhorst (2025) — Scala, written and directed by Bram Wikkerink
- Aanzoek (2024/2025) — Scala Productions, dir. Robin Elstak
- Paakeman: op Bramvontuur (2024) — solo music theatre
- Op Hoop van Zegen (2023) — Theaterschool De Trap, dir. Hans Breetveld

### Custom theatre (Wijsmakers)
With Theatergroep Wijsmakers, Bram creates custom performances for companies — team days, client events, anniversaries and kick-offs. Theatre, music and humour, written around your story.

### Contact (actor)
- Instagram: @i_am_not_bram
- Email: bram@wikkerink.me
- Book a session: https://calendly.com/bram-wikkerink/30min

---

## Fractional CFO & Deal Advisor

Bram Wikkerink provides fractional CFO services and deal advisory for growing Dutch companies. Not every business needs a full-time CFO — but every business needs someone who can cut through financial complexity and turn it into clear decisions. He works with entrepreneurs at the moments that matter: financing growth, structuring an acquisition, or preparing the organisation for its next phase.

Background: Big Four (PwC Deals — ODD, restructuring, deal analytics, valuations) and venture capital (Shaping Impact Group — impact startups, due diligence, entrepreneur coaching). MSc Economics and MSc Finance, Rijksuniversiteit Groningen.

### Services
- **Fractional CFO**: Financial leadership on a flexible basis. Budgeting, forecasting, reporting and board-level sparring.
- **Deal Advisory**: Guidance through acquisitions, mergers and divestments. From due diligence to closing.
- **Growth Financing**: Building business cases, engaging investors, structuring financing arrangements.
- **Stakeholder Management**: Investor-ready reporting and board communication. VC-background means he knows what investors need.
- **Restructuring**: Financial reorganisation, cost optimisation and operational improvements.
- **Performance Monitoring**: Tracking progress, evaluating outcomes, adjusting strategy.

### Experience
- Present: Fractional CFO & Deal Advisor (independent)
- Venture Capital: Investment Professional, Shaping Impact Group — impact startups up to €1M, due diligence, entrepreneur coaching
- Advisory: Senior Associate Business Restructuring & Trainee, PwC Deals — ODD, restructuring, deal analytics, valuations
- Education: MSc Economics · MSc Finance · BSc Business Economics, Rijksuniversiteit Groningen

### Skills
Dutch · English · German · Microsoft Office · Power Suite · Alteryx · Tableau

### Contact (CFO)

- Email: bram@wikkerink.me
